How many spiders are there? Có bao nhiêu con nhện? There're three insects: Có 3 con côn trùng. There're two ants: Có 2 con kiến. There're four worms: Có 4 con sâu. questions.correct_answer: 1. How many insects are there?→There're three insects.; 2. How many ants are there?→There're two ants.; 3. How many worms are there?→There're four worms.; 4. How many spiders are there?→There're nine spiders.
